PowerShell($timeout = 60; $elapsed = 0; do { Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; $elapsed += 5; $result = docker info 2>&1; if \($result -notmatch "error"\) { Write-Host "Docker ready after ${elapsed}s"; break } Write-Host "Waiting... ${elapsed}s" } while \($elapsed -lt $timeout\); if \($elapsed -ge $timeout\) { Write-Host "Timeout" })
